data.title: Quantum Metric named Strong Performer in digital analytics, received highest scores in real-time analytics and mobile app deployment.
data.description: Colorado Springs based company Quantum Metric has been acknowledged for its exceptional performance in real-time analytics, mobile app deployment, and measurement criteria, receiving the highest possible scores in these areas. This announcement was made on July 31, 2025. The customer-centric digital analytics platform has been recognized as a Strong Performer in the industry.

data.title: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) to report Q2 earnings with $1.33 EPS, $162.11B revenue. Analysts revise forecasts. Share prices fall 0.4% to $230.19.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon.com, Inc. is scheduled to announce its second-quarter earnings on July 31 after the market closes. Analysts anticipate the company, headquartered in Seattle, Washington, to post earnings of $1.33 per share, representing an increase from the $1.26 per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be around $162.11 billion, up from $147.98 billion in the previous year. Despite reports of raising prices on numerous products in response to tariffs by President Donald Trump, Amazon has refuted these claims. The company's stock experienced a 0.4% decline, closing at $230.19 on Wednesday. For further details and analyst ratings, readers can explore the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.
The U.S. Treasury: U.S. customs duties revenues reached $87 billion in the first half of the year, surpassing the total revenues of 2024.

data.title: FireMon and Illumio integration speeds up Zero Trust network policy rollouts, reduces troubleshooting time from hours to minutes.
data.description: In Lenexa, Kansas, a prominent network security and firewall policy management company, FireMon, has revealed a partnership with Illumio to bridge the operational divide between Zero Trust strategies and conventional network security. This integration aims to align segmentation modifications related to applications and Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) with firewall rule adjustments as enterprises increasingly embrace Zero Trust measures through microsegmentation. This collaboration seeks to streamline workflows to ensure greater cohesion in security approaches.

data.title: Everli, Italian E-Grocery Marketplace, to go public via $180M merger with Melar Acquisition Corp.
data.description: A significant e-grocery platform in Italy, Everli Global Inc., and Melar Acquisition Corp. I have revealed a definitive Agreement and Plan of Merger. The agreement, dated July 30, 2025, outlines a Proposed Transaction for the business combination of Everli and Melar. Melar is a special purpose acquisition company sponsored by Melar Acquisition Sponsor I LLC. The merger aims to solidify Everli's position in the market. Specific financial details and further developments were not disclosed as of the announcement date.

data.title: Epicor partners with SourceDay and Sovos to enhance its Kinetic ERP platform for manufacturers; focuses on AI-driven approach.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Epicor, a prominent provider of industry-specific enterprise software for enhancing business expansion, revealed its collaborations with SourceDay, a top supply chain collaboration platform, and Sovos, a leading tax compliance firm. These partnerships are designed to enhance the functionality of Epicor Kinetic ERP platform tailored for manufacturers. These integrations play a crucial role in Epicor's Cognitive ERP strategy, which leverages artificial intelligence to shift ERP’s role from being merely a system of record to a system of action.

data.title: Experian launches AI-powered Assistant for Model Risk Management to streamline processes, improve efficiency and transparency.
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California, Experian recently unveiled Experian Assistant for Model Risk Management, a groundbreaking tool designed to assist financial institutions in overseeing and handling models more effectively throughout the model development process. This innovative solution is seamlessly incorporated into the Experian Ascend Platform™ and utilizes ValidMind technology to expedite model validation, enhance auditability and transparency. It potentially aids financial institutions in lessening regulatory burdens.

data.title: Informatica enhances IDMC platform with AI features for enterprise data management. Offers new features like data integration, governance, and iPaaS. Chief Digital Officer at KPMG highlights importance of AI in digital transformation.
data.description: Informatica, based in Redwood City, California, unveiled enhanced capabilities for its Intelligent Data Management Cloud (IDMC) platform. The updated features leverage AI technology to streamline and improve access to AI-compatible data throughout enterprises. The latest release incorporates new functionalities in data integration, governance, quality, master data management, and iPaaS. Kelle Fontenot, the Chief Digital Officer at KPMG, emphasized the critical nature of AI and digital transformation in business success.

data.title: OMNY Health reaches 100M patients in US for healthcare data research, ensuring access to HIPAA-compliant RWD for insights.
data.description: OMNY Health, a prominent healthcare ecosystem specializing in compliant real-world data (RWD) insights at scale, has announced the inclusion of over 100 million patients from every state in the U.S. within its data network. This significant milestone cements OMNY Health's status as a top provider of extensive, HIPAA-compliant de-identified RWD. The company offers unmatched access to this data for life sciences firms, healthcare providers, and AI developers.

data.title: Martha Stewart appointed Cast Iron Ambassador by Kohler to showcase design & craftsmanship. KOHLER, Wis. - July 31, 2025.
data.description: Renowned lifestyle guru Martha Stewart has recently joined forces with Kohler, a leading brand in kitchen and bath innovation. The collaboration aims to showcase the enduring elegance and quality craftsmanship of enameled cast iron products. The partnership was officially announced on July 31, 2025, in Kohler, Wisconsin. Kohler Co. is recognized globally for its exceptional designs and innovations in the kitchen and bath industry.

data.title: OPI launches GELement™, its first at-home gel polish kit for DIY consumers on July 31, 2025. #OPIGELement describes it as high-quality with top tier colors, along with an easy-to-use LED lamp.
data.description: Introducing OPIGELement, a revolutionary product in the nail care industry, launched in Los Angeles on July 31, 2025. With OPI's new at-home gel polish, dubbed GELement™, users can achieve salon-quality results without leaving their homes. This product includes high-quality formulas, a variety of top-tier colors, and an easy-to-use LED lamp. Designed to make users feel like nail art experts, OPIGELement offers a convenient way to elevate your manicure game.

data.title: OtterBox offers stylish, durable cases for back-to-school tech protection. Ideal for phones and tablets.
data.description: Prepare for the upcoming school year effortlessly with OtterBox in Fort Collins, Colorado. This year, OtterBox offers a range of durable and stylish cases for phones and tablets to ensure your mobile devices stay protected during classes, commutes, and late-night study sessions. Whether you're seeking additional...

data.title: Caduceus Software Systems Corp. (OTC: CSOC) will showcase McLovin's Pet Brand at SUPERZOO 2025 in Las Vegas.
data.description: Caduceus Software Systems Corp., the parent company of the rapidly expanding natural pet food brand McLovin's, disclosed its attendance at SUPERZOO 2025, a prominent pet industry trade show in North America. The event is scheduled to take place from July 31, 2025.

data.title: TPx named a Top Employer 2025 in the US by Top Employers Institute, a leading managed services provider.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, on July 31, 2025, TPx, a prominent managed services provider across the country, has been acknowledged as a Top Employer 2025 in the United States by the esteemed Top Employers Institute, a global leader in recognizing exemplary people practices. This prestigious accolade highlights TPx's commitment to excellence in employee management.

data.title: SandboxAQ releases AQtive Guard to combat security threats from non-human identities. PALO ALTO, CA, July 31, 2025.
data.description: With an increase in credential-based attacks, AQtive Guard from SandboxAQ now offers security teams comprehensive protection, visibility, and automated measures for non-human identities and cryptographic assets. This solution is now widely accessible to the public, providing crucial support in combating cyber threats. This announcement comes from PALO ALTO, Calif., on July 31, 2025.
